title: Le plus beau jour de ma vie
original_title: Le Plus Beau Jour de ma vie
overview: Not too excited Arthur asks marriage Lola. What should have been a quiet ceremony evolves in something bigger, expensive and overwhelming as family is involved. The organization of the best day of their lives threatens to destroy them.
